name: IEEE Computational Intelligence Society
description: Explores AI, machine learning, and intelligent systems via hands-on projects and algorithmic research.

name: IEEE Industry Applications Society
description: Bridges electrical and electronic theory with real-world industrial and commercial practices.

name: IEEE Computer Society
description: Focuses on technical excellence in computer science, software engineering, and systems architecture.

name: IEEE Power & Energy Society
description: Researching electric power, global energy systems, utility standards, and smart grid infrastructure.

name: IEEE Systems Council
description: Dedicated to multi-disciplinary systems engineering and holistic, global systems thinking.

name: IEEE Aerospace and Electronic Systems Society
description: Complex space, air, marine, and ground environmental engineering systems and radar tech.

name: IEEE Antennas and Propagation Society
description: Advancing the theory, engineering design, and application of antennas and wave propagation.

name: IEEE Microwave Theory and Technology Society
description: Advances radio-frequency (RF), microwave, millimeter-wave, and terahertz technologies.

name: IEEE Electron Devices Society
description: Investigates structural advancements in electron, ion device technologies, and nano-fabrication.

name: IEEE Sensors Council
description: Focuses on the foundational theory, physical design, and application of sensors and sensing phenomena.

name: IEEE Solid-State Circuits Society
description: Dedicated to integrated circuit (IC) architecture, hardware design, and microchip fabrication.

name: IEEE Council on Electronic Design Automation
description: Provides a structural anchor for the Computer-Aided Design (CAD) and EDA software community.

name: IEEE Signal Processing Society
description: An academic and industry research-focused chapter for signal processing algorithms and engineers.

name: IEEE Consumer Technology Society
description: Focuses on practical consumer electronic hardware implementations and electronic engineering system analysis.
